data.title: Alphamab’s KN026 Breast Cancer Trial Secures High-Profile ASCO 2026 Slot
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Alphamab Oncology ( (HK:9966) ) has issued an update.

Alphamab Oncology announced that phase III trial results for KN026, its anti-HER2 bispecific antibody co-developed with CSPC subsidiary JMT-Bio, in combination with albumin-bound docetaxel HB1801 as neoadjuvant therapy for HER2-positive breast cancer, have been selected for a Late-Breaking Abstract oral presentation at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting. The head-to-head study showed KN026 plus HB1801 significantly improved total pathological complete response versus the current standard regimen of trastuzumab, pertuzumab and docetaxel, suggesting the regimen could become a new standard of care and reinforcing Alphamab’s position in HER2-targeted oncology, while KN026 continues to advance through multiple registrational trials in breast and gastric cancers with regulatory designations in China and the U.S.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:9966) stock is a Buy with a HK$9.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Alphamab Oncology stock, see the HK:9966 Stock Forecast page.

More about Alphamab Oncology

Alphamab Oncology is a China-based biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative oncology therapies, including bispecific antibodies such as KN026. The company targets cancers driven by HER2 and other biomarkers, with a growing portfolio of late-stage clinical programs and partnerships that emphasize both domestic and international commercialization opportunities.

Average Trading Volume: 1,559,211

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$10.94B

An update from Beijing Fourth Paradigm Technology Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6682) ) is now available.

Phancy Group Co., Ltd. has entered into a placing agreement with a syndicate of placing agents to issue up to 38.8 million new H shares at HK$40.36 each under its existing general mandate. The placing shares represent about 12.09% of issued H shares and 7.47% of total issued shares before the deal, and about 10.79% and 6.95% respectively after completion, with all placees required to be independent third parties.

The transaction is expected to raise gross proceeds of approximately HK$1,565.97 million and net proceeds of about HK$1,555.63 million, implying a net placing price of roughly HK$40.09 per share. Priced at a discount to recent five-day and last-trading-day closes but at a premium to the 30-day average, the deal allows the company to rapidly bolster its capital base without additional shareholder approval, potentially strengthening its financial flexibility and market positioning, subject to listing approval for the new shares in Hong Kong.

More about Beijing Fourth Paradigm Technology Co. Ltd. Class H

Phancy Group Co., Ltd., formerly known as Beijing Fourth Paradigm Technology Co., Ltd., is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong under stock code 6682. The company issues H shares to international investors via the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, using capital markets to support its business expansion and corporate development.

data.title: Greatview Swings to Quarterly Loss as Costs Rise Amid Ongoing Trading Suspension
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) has provided an update.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company reported unaudited management accounts for the three months ended 31 March 2026, showing revenue of RMB396.8 million, down slightly from RMB415.2 million a year earlier. The group swung to a net loss of RMB7.7 million from a profit of RMB43.1 million, pressured by higher administrative expenses, reduced other income, adverse movements in other gains, and the absence of prior-year associate profits.

The company said the disclosure aims to keep shareholders and potential investors informed of its operational and financial position while trading in its shares remains suspended on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The results highlight a deterioration in profitability despite relatively stable sales, underscoring margin and cost challenges that may weigh on investor sentiment and the company’s near-term financial flexibility.

More about Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited is a Hong Kong-listed manufacturer of aseptic packaging solutions, primarily serving the beverage and liquid food industries. The group operates through subsidiaries and targets customers requiring sterile, shelf-stable packaging, positioning itself within the broader food and beverage packaging supply chain.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$3.52B

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited has proposed a final ordinary dividend of HKD 0.006 per share for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, subject to shareholder approval on 23 June 2026. An announcement from New Huo Technology Holdings Limited ( (HK:1611) ) is now available.

Bitfire Group Holdings has disclosed that its wholly owned subsidiary Sinohope Digital Service Limited has agreed to acquire specific software assets from Avenir Investment Management Limited for US$1.58 million. data.title: Ascentage Pharma to Showcase Six Cancer Drug Studies at 2026 ASCO Meeting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Ascentage Pharma Group International ( (HK:6855) ).

Ascentage Pharma will present data from six clinical studies involving three key drug candidates at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology Annual Meeting in Chicago, underscoring the company’s growing presence in cutting-edge cancer research. Three of the selected abstracts are rapid oral presentations and three are poster presentations, highlighting the clinical potential of its targeted therapies in both adult hematologic cancers and pediatric solid tumors.

Two of the rapid oral presentations will feature Olverembatinib, including its use in combination with blinatumomab for advanced leukemia and updated efficacy and safety data as a second-line therapy in chronic-phase chronic myeloid leukemia. A third rapid oral presentation will cover Alrizomadlin alone or with Lisaftoclax in pediatric patients with relapsed or metastatic rhabdomyosarcoma and other soft-tissue sarcomas, potentially strengthening Ascentage Pharma’s positioning in both hematology and pediatric oncology segments.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:6855) stock is a Buy with a HK$93.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ascentage Pharma Group International stock, see the HK:6855 Stock Forecast page.

More about Ascentage Pharma Group International

Ascentage Pharma Group International is a Hong Kong–listed biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative oncology therapies. Its leading products include Olverembatinib, the first third-generation BCR-ABL inhibitor approved in China, Lisaftoclax, a China-developed Bcl-2 selective inhibitor, and Alrizomadlin, an MDM2-p53 inhibitor, targeting hematologic malignancies and solid tumors in global markets.

Average Trading Volume: 2,073,352

An announcement from Shanghai Biren Technology Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6082) ) is now available.

Shanghai Biren Technology Co., Ltd. has convened its annual general meeting for June 15, 2026, in Shanghai to review the board’s work report, the auditor’s report and audited financial statements for the year ended December 31, 2025. Shareholders will also vote on reappointing PricewaterhouseCoopers as auditor, authorizing the board to set director and auditor remuneration, and approving a proposal not to distribute a final dividend for 2025.

The meeting will further decide on the election of the second session of the board, including the re-election of several executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors and the appointment of a new independent non-executive director, Dr. Zhiyi Yu. In addition, shareholders are asked to grant general mandates to the board to repurchase H shares and issue new shares, and to approve amendments to the Articles of Association and the procedural rules for general and board meetings, signaling ongoing refinement of the company’s capital management flexibility and corporate governance framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:6082) stock is a Buy with a HK$54.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shanghai Biren Technology Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:6082 Stock Forecast page.

Breton Technology Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1333) ) just unveiled an update.

Breton Technology Co., Ltd. has entered into a connected capital increase transaction involving its non-wholly owned subsidiary Breton Intelligent Power and indirect subsidiary Breton Energy Saving. Three individual investors, including controlling shareholder and director Chen Fangming, will inject a total of RMB38 million in cash, raising Breton Energy Saving’s registered capital from RMB12 million to RMB50 million.

Following the capital injection, Breton Intelligent Power’s stake in Breton Energy Saving will be diluted from 100% to 24%, meaning Breton Energy Saving will cease to be a subsidiary and will be deconsolidated from the group’s financial statements. The deal is classified as a connected transaction and a deemed disposal under Hong Kong listing rules, triggering reporting and announcement obligations but exempting the company from circular issuance and independent shareholders’ approval, thereby streamlining execution while altering the group’s corporate and financial structure.

data.title: Sino Biopharm Unit LaNova Unveils Promising ADC Data at AACR 2026
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sino Biopharmaceutical ( (HK:1177) ) has issued an announcement.

Sino Biopharmaceutical’s wholly owned unit LaNova Medicines has showcased new preclinical data on two antibody-drug conjugates, LM-364 and LM-338, at the American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting 2026, underscoring its push into next-generation oncology biologics. The programs target solid tumors with technologies aimed at improving tumor selectivity and safety profiles, reinforcing the group’s positioning in high-value cancer therapeutics.

LM-364, a Nectin-4 tumor microenvironment-activated ADC, demonstrated strong antitumor activity across multiple patient-derived xenograft models and a favorable safety profile in animal studies, and has already progressed to an IND filing with the U.S. FDA ahead of a planned first-in-human trial in 2026. LM-338, designed as a potential first-in-class ADC against the tumor-specific STn glycan antigen, showed high target specificity and efficient internalization, signaling future pipeline expansion in solid tumor indications if later-stage data confirm these preclinical results.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1177) stock is a Buy with a HK$8.70 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sino Biopharmaceutical stock, see the HK:1177 Stock Forecast page.

More about Sino Biopharmaceutical

Sino Biopharmaceutical Limited is a China-focused pharmaceutical company engaged in the research, development, manufacturing, and commercialization of innovative therapies, with a strong emphasis on oncology. Through subsidiaries such as LaNova Medicines, it develops advanced antibody-drug conjugates and other targeted treatments for solid tumors and other cancers.

An update from Zijin Mining Group Co ( (HK:2899) ) is now available.

Zijin Mining Group has approved a profit distribution and return plan for 2026 to 2028 that formalizes how it will balance shareholder returns with long-term development needs. The framework is designed to ensure continuity and stability in dividend policy while considering factors such as profitability, cash flow, investment demand, and external financing conditions.

Huanxi Media Group Ltd. ( (HK:1003) ) has provided an update.

Huanxi Media Group has completed a major capital-raising move through the subscription of 727,638,000 new shares and the issuance of 731,294,472 warrants to C River Limited, an affiliate of the previously identified subscribers. The new shares were issued at about HK$0.30 each and the warrants at HK$0.01 with an exercise price of HK$0.44, significantly enlarging the company’s share capital and bringing in a substantial new strategic shareholder.

Following the closing on 21 April 2026, C River Limited now holds 16.60% of Huanxi’s enlarged share capital, which could rise to 28.52% upon full exercise of the warrants, reshaping the company’s ownership structure. Existing shareholders, including strategic partners such as Bilibili Inc. and Maoyan Entertainment, see their percentage stakes diluted, signalling a shift in control dynamics and potentially strengthening Huanxi’s funding base and strategic flexibility for future operations and growth initiatives.

More about Huanxi Media Group Ltd.

Huanxi Media Group Ltd., incorporated in Bermuda and listed in Hong Kong, operates in the media and entertainment sector. The company focuses on film, television and related content production and distribution, targeting Chinese-speaking audiences and partnering with major online platforms and entertainment firms to expand its viewership and monetisation channels.

data.title: Greentech Technology Faces Hong Kong Listing Cancellation After Prolonged Trading Suspension
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Greentech Technology International Limited ( (HK:0195) ) has issued an announcement.

Greentech Technology International Limited has announced that the Listing Committee of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong has decided to cancel the company’s listing, following a prolonged suspension of trading in its shares since 2 September 2024. The suspension stems from the company’s failure to publish its 2024 interim and annual results and 2025 interim results, as well as ongoing resumption guidance, independent investigations, internal control reviews, and an anonymous complaint to the auditor, with the formal resumption deadline having expired on 1 March 2026.

The company has disclosed that it retains a right of review and has submitted a review request against the Listing Committee’s delisting decision, meaning the cancellation is not yet final pending completion of the review process. Trading in the company’s securities will remain suspended until it can fully address the Stock Exchange’s resumption conditions, leaving shareholders and other stakeholders facing continued uncertainty over the future status and liquidity of the stock.

More about Greentech Technology International Limited

Greentech Technology International Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating through its subsidiaries as an investment holding group. The company is traded on the Main Board of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong under stock code 00195, with its business subject to Hong Kong’s securities and futures regulatory framework.
